evaluation_scope: partial processed-output evaluation only; not a completed 28-article benchmark
interruption_reason: OpenRouter HTTP 402 quota/balance failure stopped the run before all articles completed; unfinished articles are excluded from this processed-output evaluation denominator.
matching_policy: Article-aligned evaluation over processed articles only. DNA sequences normalized by uppercasing/removing whitespace and deduplicated per article. Matching accepts exact, substring, reverse-complement exact, and reverse-complement substring matches.
